article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb. 8 (Xinhua) -- Bangladeshi Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina said on Wednesday that the South Asian country will import liquefied natural gas (LNG) from spot market to meet the demand of gas for power generation.

"The process of importing LNG from the spot market has already been adopted to meet the demand of gas," she said, while responding to a question from a lawmaker in the parliament.

verification.quote_best_match: the South Asian country will import liquefied natural gas (LNG) from spot market to meet the demand of gas for power generation.
verification.judge_reasoning: The quoted statement appears verbatim in the article.
